title: 3,000 points profit gained by my ML system.
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
Hey guys,

The long is closed and I am happy to say this one worked out well. Entered at 71,949 and closed at 75,249. That is \~3,000 points of profit. Trade chart is attached.

Felt good after the recent rough patch honestly. Trading a system does not mean it never hurts when it loses. It still does. So a clean win like this is always welcome.

Anyway I have been posting these signals for a while now and I think enough time has passed to talk a bit about what is actually powering them.

It is a fully built machine learning system designed specifically for BTC direction prediction. Not a simple script, not an indicator slapped together over a weekend. A proper machine learning system that also retrains itself after n number of days to keep up and adapt with newer market conditions. That way the chance of edge decaying dies.   
  
The backtest numbers are genuinely something I am proud of. And also live trading it since September and the best part is my system is still in DEEP GREEN when BTC is down by \~35%. Even in this choppy days my system is beating BTC without any stress.

Sharpe ratio of above 3, which if you know what that means, is not easy to get to. CAGR of 56%. And it is completely systematic, just the model doing what it was trained to do.

And you have all been watching it trade live right here. You have seen the losses too, I never hid those. So this is not some polished highlight reel. This is what it actually looks like in real trading conditions.

I have been thinking about it for a bit and I am now open to the idea of selling the system to the right person. If you are someone who takes systematic trading seriously and wants to know more about the system, just hit me with a message.

https://preview.redd.it/zii8ko0f4ovg1.png?width=1147&format=png&auto=webp&s=4fc9bab0e6d45642197851166246a075c8d7c89b

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
You think that?

How did you even get to this conclusion without checking the report or even having a proper conversation?
